messages: Worker bees are sorting the combs...
Bee patient, results are on the way...
Building the comb, one cell at a time...
Hive got your data right here...
Preparing a fresh batch of hive metrics...

page.title: HiveHub
page.subtitle: Live weight and temperature visualisation from your separate HiveHub backend.
page.removeConfirm: Remove {{name}} from your HivePal account? You can add it again with the claim code when no other users still have access.
page.removeSuccess: HiveHub device removed from your account.

setup.title: Devices
setup.description: Select or remove a claimed HiveHub device. Expand the setup to claim devices, check status, map scales, and calibrate the raw readings.
setup.noDevices: No devices claimed yet — open the setup to add one.

claim.title: Claim HiveHub device
claim.description: Claim codes are sent by the firmware with measurements until the device is claimed.

errors.missingCode: Enter the claim code printed/configured for the device.

mapping.title: Scale mapping
mapping.description: These labels stay in HiveHub. Later, this is the right place to map Scale 1/2 to HivePal hive IDs for inspection markers.
mapping.hiveNamePlaceholder: Select or type a hive name

errors.missingEmail: Enter the email address of an existing HivePal user.

calibration.title: Calibration
calibration.subtitle: Guided fast-mode calibration for the raw scale readings.
calibration.viewerNotice: Viewer access can read measurements but cannot change calibration.

workflow.title: Simple workflow
workflow.step1: Start calibration mode and wait for fast readings.
workflow.step3: Place a known weight and enter its kg value.
workflow.step4: Capture the weighted reading and save.
workflow.step5: The app stops calibration mode after saving.

mode.title: Fast calibration mode
mode.activeDescription: Active: new raw readings should arrive every few seconds.
mode.queuedDescription: Queued: waiting for the device to wake up once.
mode.offDescription: Off: the scale is using normal battery-saving sleep.

wizard.title: Scale calibration wizard
wizard.description: Follow the steps in order. The app uses only fresh raw readings from calibration mode, then saves and stops fast mode automatically.
wizard.alertQueuedDescription: The device needs one normal wake-up before it can receive the command.
wizard.alertStartDescription: This disables the annoying deep-sleep delay for about 10 minutes.
wizard.emptyScaleHint: Remove weight from {{scaleName}}, then wait for one fast reading.
wizard.knownWeightHint: Place the weight and enter its value in kg.
wizard.noChangeDescription: Check that the known weight is on the correct scale and wait for another fast reading.

advanced.title: Advanced manual settings
advanced.latestRawHint: Latest raw: {{value}}. Weight is calculated as (raw - offset) / factor.
advanced.configVersion: Config version {{version}}. Use advanced settings only for fine tuning or recovery.

toasts.modeQueued: Calibration mode queued. The scale will switch to fast readings when it wakes up.
toasts.startModeFirst: Start calibration mode and wait until fast readings are active.
toasts.enterKnownWeightFirst: Enter the known weight in kg first.
toasts.waitForNewReading: Wait for a new fast reading after placing the known weight, then capture again.
toasts.offsetSet: {{scaleName}} offset set to latest raw reading.

errors.sendInterval: Use a whole-number interval of at least 60 seconds.
errors.offsetsWhole: Scale offsets must be whole raw-count numbers.
errors.factorsNonZero: Scale factors must be non-zero numbers.
errors.noLatestRaw: No latest raw reading available for {{scaleName}} yet.
errors.validOffset: Enter a valid offset for {{scaleName}} first.
errors.knownWeight: Enter a known weight greater than 0 kg for {{scaleName}}.
errors.factorNotCalculated: {{scaleName}} factor could not be calculated. Check the latest raw, offset, and known weight.

tempco.title: Temperature compensation
tempco.description: Load cells drift with temperature. The backend smooths the temperature with an exponential moving average (EMA) to damp short transients (e.g. sunrise), then corrects the reported weight as raw − coeff · (EMA(temp) − ref) on read; the raw weight is never changed.
tempco.sourceHint: Ambient tracks the cell body closely in steady state and is the recommended default.
tempco.refHint: Temperature at which the correction is zero.
tempco.autoFitHint: Auto-fit regresses the last 3 days of raw weight against the EMA-smoothed selected temperature, then applies and enables the result. For a clean fit, capture a window where the physical load is constant and the temperature swings.

errors.refTemp: Reference temperature must be a number (°C).

firmware.title: Firmware upload
firmware.description: Upload a firmware binary and register it as a release. New devices of the matching type pick it up on their next update check.

update.title: Firmware update
update.description: Scales never update on their own — you approve each new build here before this scale installs it.
update.unavailable: Firmware status is unavailable right now.
update.availableBody: This scale is running {{current}}. Apply to update it to {{version}}.
update.applied: Firmware {{version}} approved — the scale will update on its next check-in.
update.queued: Update {{version}} approved. The scale will install it on its next check-in.
update.viewerNotice: Only device owners and admins can apply firmware updates.

notice.noPermission: Only device owners and admins can upload firmware. Your role is “{{role}}”.
notice.selectDevice: Select a claimed device to upload firmware.

errors.missingFile: Choose a firmware binary (.bin) to upload.

hiveinsideOta.title: Trigger HiveInside OTA
hiveinsideOta.description: Uploading a HiveInside firmware now automatically queues the OTA relay to both sensor slots over BLE. Use this to re-queue the active release to a specific slot. Keep the sensor powered and awake during the update.
hiveinsideOta.autoQueueFailed: Could not auto-queue the HiveInside OTA for slots {{slots}}.

sdData.title: Import SD card data
sdData.description: Upload the data you downloaded from the scale in AP mode. Re-uploading the same file is safe — existing readings are skipped automatically.
sdData.accepts: Accepts measurements.ndjson or the hivescale-sd-data.tar download.

notice.noPermission: Only device owners and admins can import SD data. Your role is “{{role}}”.
notice.selectDevice: Select a claimed device to import its SD card data.

errors.missingFile: Choose the .ndjson backup or the .tar SD download to upload.

diagram.title: Measurements
diagram.subtitle: Weight, temperature, and entrance activity over time
diagram.noMeasurements: No measurements for the selected range.
diagram.noDataForSeries: No data in the selected range.

sound.title: Hive sound
sound.noDataForChannel: No data for {{name}} in this range.
sound.thresholds: Thresholds used by the Insights engine: piping > −45 dBFS, stress > −38 dBFS, queenless hum > −40 dBFS with quiet piping. Calibrate against your own baseline.

beecounter.title: Entrance Counter
beecounter.subtitle: Bees entering and exiting per measurement interval
beecounter.noData: No BeeCounter data found for this device.

insights.title: Insights
insights.description: Sensor-based alerts derived from weight and temperature trends.
insights.noActiveAlerts: No active alerts in the last {{count}} days.

tooltip.title: Tests performed
tooltip.description: Each detector runs on every measurement pass against the last 14 days of weight and hive-temperature data.

detectors.title: Pre-swarm watch (Phase 1)
detectors.detail: 24h brood-nest temperature std-dev ≥ 1.5× the 7-day baseline → watch.

detectors.title: Imminent swarm (Phase 2)
detectors.detail: Brood temp ≥ 1.5 °C above 4h baseline, still rising ≥ 0.5 °C/h, above 36.5 °C → warning.

detectors.title: Swarm event (Phase 3)
detectors.detail: Weight drop ≥ 1.5 kg within ≤ 30 min. Daytime (09–17) → critical, otherwise warning.

detectors.title: Queenlessness (fallback, no audio)
detectors.detail: Active season + 7d hive-temp std-dev > 1.0 °C AND |weight change| < 0.2 kg → warning.

detectors.title: Robbing
detectors.detail: Sustained weight loss ≥ 0.4 kg/h for ≥ 30 min, no swarm signature. Late afternoon (15–19) → warning, else watch.

detectors.title: Foraging intensity
detectors.detail: 24h weight delta: ≥ 1.0 kg = strong flow (info), ≥ 0.2 kg = moderate (info), ≤ −0.2 kg = negative (watch).

detectors.title: Brood cycle / colony state
detectors.detail: 24h hive-temp std-dev < 0.5 °C around 34–35 °C = active brood (info); > 2.0 °C = broodless / weak (watch).

detectors.title: Absconding / collapse trend
detectors.detail: 14d weight loss > 100 g/day AND widening daily temp std-dev (positive slope) → watch.

detectors.title: Winter survival risk (Oct–Feb)
detectors.detail: Min hive temp 7d < ambient mean + 2 °C, or weight loss > 300 g/week. Both → warning, one → watch.

detectors.title: Harvest window
detectors.detail: Earlier 7d gain > 2 kg/week, now < 0.3 kg/week for ≥ 4 days → info.

history.title: Insights history
history.description: Past and current sensor-based alerts, including ones that have since resolved. Newest first.

empty.title: No history yet
empty.description: No alerts have been recorded for this device.
empty.descriptionFiltered: No alerts have been recorded for this device matching this filter.
